scenario.name: Late NOTIFY
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 REGISTER [last_Contact:] Content-Length: 0 Expires: 60
